title: tithonia calva var. auriculata
intro: Tithonia calva var. auriculata, also known as Mexican sunflower, is a perennial plant species within the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits such as expectorant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Tithonia calva var. auriculata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
